summary: Comprehensive testing of Project Centurion iteration 8 - Backend APIs (25/25 tests pass), frontend auth flow with Google OAuth and Magic Link, Admin Dashboard route protection, Settings page, Dashboard module navigation, and Habit Engine scheduler verification. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Welcome modal overlay blocks sidebar navigation clicks in preview mode
ui_bugs.note: Modal can be dismissed, navigation works via direct URL

issues: Recharts warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - cosmetic issue during initial mount

backend: Health endpoint /api/health returns 200 with status 'ok' and supabase 'connected'
Root endpoint /api/ returns API info with version 3.0.0
Projection engine - high MRR calculation works
Projection engine - high growth rate validation (422)
frontend: Landing page loads with '100Cr Engine' title
Landing page shows '₹100 Crore' headline and projection chart
Auth modal opens from 'Start free' button
Auth modal shows 'Sign in to Centurion' title
Auth modal - Google OAuth button present (data-testid='auth-google-btn')
Auth modal - Email input present (data-testid='auth-email-input')
Auth modal - Submit button present (data-testid='auth-submit-btn')
Auth modal - 'or' divider shows both auth options
Auth modal - Benefits list shows 3 items
Admin route /admin correctly redirects to landing when not authenticated
Settings page loads via /preview/settings (data-testid='settings')
Settings - Profile tab: Personal Information section visible
Settings - Profile tab: Company Information section visible
Settings - Profile tab: Save Changes button visible
Settings - Billing tab: Free Plan badge visible
Settings - Billing tab: Upgrade to Founder Plan button visible
Settings - Billing tab: Usage This Month section with progress bars
Settings - Billing tab: Payment Method section visible
Settings - Billing tab: Invoices section with 2 items
Settings - Support tab: Need Help section visible
Dashboard Command Centre page loads correctly
Dashboard Forecasting Engine page loads correctly
Dashboard AI Growth Coach page loads correctly
Dashboard Benchmark Intelligence page loads correctly
Sidebar navigation items visible (Revenue Intelligence, Forecasting Engine, AI Growth Coach)
habit_engine: checkin_reminder job registered (25th of month 10:00 AM IST)

action_items: ADMIN_EMAILS environment variable not set in backend/.env - admin endpoints will return 403 even for authenticated users until this is configured
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py correctly handles JWKS (RS256) and HS256 dual verification with proper fallback
auth.py placeholder JWT secret ('your-jwt-secret') is correctly detected and falls back to SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
AuthContext.jsx has signInWithGoogle method properly implemented using supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth
AdminDashboard.jsx correctly requires authentication via ProtectedRoute
Admin endpoints in admin.py correctly use require_admin dependency which checks ADMIN_EMAILS env var
Scheduler.py properly registers 4 habit engine cron jobs with APScheduler
All protected endpoints correctly return 403 without authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Backend health check passes with Supabase connected, 2) Auth flow with Google OAuth button and Magic Link input present, 3) Admin Dashboard at /admin route correctly protected - redirects to landing when not authenticated, 4) New admin endpoints (/api/admin/scheduler/status, /api/admin/system/health) are protected and return 403 without auth, 5) Habit Engine scheduler running with 4 cron jobs, 6) Settings page profile save functionality present, 7) Dashboard modules (Forecasting, AI Coach, Benchmarks) all load correctly. Note: ADMIN_EMAILS env var not set, so admin endpoints will return 403 even for authenticated users.

mocked_api.note: All APIs are live with Supabase. Dashboard uses fallback data when not authenticated.

google_oauth_note: Google OAuth button is present and calls supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth. Full OAuth flow requires Google provider to be enabled in Supabase project settings (Authentication > Providers > Google).
admin_dashboard_note: Admin Dashboard at /admin is protected by ProtectedRoute. When authenticated, it fetches data from admin endpoints. Admin endpoints require ADMIN_EMAILS env var to be set with comma-separated admin email addresses.
